text:
LeBron James, a towering figure in the sporting world, has carved out an unmatched legacy both on and off the basketball court. However, his selection as Team USA's male flagbearer for the opening ceremony of theParis 2024 Olympicssparked controversy across sections of the sporting world.

Despite being one of the most recognisable names in American culture, many felt that giving him such a prominent role was a snub to athletes whose careers are solely focused on the Games. Nonetheless, theNBAsuperstar was chosen after securing the most votes from nearly 600 members of Team USA, reportsthe Mirror.

His basketball teammate Steph Curry, who put forward his name for the honour, argued that the four-time NBA champion's "entire career on and off the court" made him more than deserving of the esteemed position. And he may have a point. James is one of the most successful athletes in US history and is widely considered one of the greatest basketball players of all time.

As a result, he has amassed a staggering personal fortune that would even make Cristiano Ronaldo blush withForbesreporting that James' net worth is an eye-watering $1.2 billion (£930 million), making him the first and currently only billionaire basketball player.

A significant portion of this wealth comes from his success on the court, with James enjoying a glittering 21-year career in the NBA, reportedly earning $450m (£350m) from his various contracts. He began his career with the Cleveland Cavaliers, being chosen as the first pick in the 2003 draft and earning the title of Rookie of the Year in 2004.

By 2005, he had already established himself as one of the league's top players, leading Cleveland to their first NBA Finals appearance in 2007. In 2009, he bagged the NBA MVP award and repeated the feat in 2010 before moving to the Miami Heat. There, he clinched his first two NBA Championships in 2012 and 2013, also securing the MVP award in both seasons.



Discovery+is the new home of the Olympics. The streamer is set to broadcast 3,800 hours of sport live from Paris.

Sports fans can getDiscovery+ for £3.99a month until the end of 2024 via Amazon Prime's video channels. This also comes with anAmazon Prime 30-day free trial.

The Ohio-born star then returned to Cleveland in 2014, guiding the team to their maiden NBA Championship in 2016 and in 2018. He then switched sides again, this time joining the Los Angeles Lakers, where he won a fifth NBA title in 2020, the franchise's 17th in total.

His achievements off the court are equally remarkable. He inked an endorsement deal with Nike in 2003 and has a lifetime contract with the sports brand, reportedly valued at $1bn (£780m). Besides that, he has profitable partnerships with Coca-Cola, Beats by Dre, and Kia, raking in hundreds of millions more.

LeBron's financial savvy extends to strategic investments as well. He is a founding partner in Blaze Pizza, a fast-growing pizza chain where his stake is now estimated to be around $40m (£31m) while having invested in Liverpool FC and the Boston Red Sox.

In addition, he co-founded SpringHill Entertainment with business partner Maverick Carter, a production company responsible for numerous successful films, TV shows, and documentaries which includes the box-office smash hit Space Jam: A New Legacy, where James took on the leading role.

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

Like many wealthy individuals, James has invested in an impressive real estate portfolio. His properties include a lavish $37m (£27m) mansion in Beverly Hills, California. With these diverse sources of income, LeBron has evolved from a globally renowned athlete to a true cultural icon, standing shoulder to shoulder with the likes of Lionel Messi, David Beckham and Tiger Woods.

title: LeBron James USA Olympics and has colossal billionaire net worth | Other | Sport | Express.co.uk
author: Fasika Zelealem, Harry Brent
description: LeBron James is one of the most recognisable athletes in the world and it comes as no surprise that the basketball legend has amassed a staggering net worth.
